to: order any individual falling within subsection (3) to take such steps as may be specified in the order with a view to enabling the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer to comply with the court's request under subsection (2).
make an order under subsection (8) with respect to an individual who is a child

conditions.text: he is a parent of the child with respect to whom the order falling within subsection (1) was made.

to: make a request under subsection (2) in relation to a child arrangements order that is an excepted order (within the meaning given by section 11B(4)).
